content: The synthesis compares two LEO satellite beamforming papers while keeping citations attached to original papers.

citations.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications Enabling Extremely Narrow Beams
citations.quote: The first paper frames space-time beamforming for narrow LEO beams.

citations.title: Beamforming Design and Satellite Selection for Integrated Communication and Navigation
citations.quote: The second paper frames beamforming with satellite selection for integrated communication and navigation.

claims.claim_text: The first paper frames space-time beamforming for narrow LEO beams.

cited_evidence.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications Enabling Extremely Narrow Beams
cited_evidence.quote: The first paper frames space-time beamforming for narrow LEO beams.

claims.rationale: The claim restates the first paper quote.

claims.claim_text: The second paper frames beamforming with satellite selection for integrated communication and navigation.

cited_evidence.title: Beamforming Design and Satellite Selection for Integrated Communication and Navigation
cited_evidence.quote: The second paper frames beamforming with satellite selection for integrated communication and navigation.

claims.rationale: The claim restates the second paper quote.

claims.claim_text: Both papers address LEO beamforming, but with different emphases.

cited_evidence.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications Enabling Extremely Narrow Beams
cited_evidence.quote: The first paper frames space-time beamforming for narrow LEO beams.

cited_evidence.title: Beamforming Design and Satellite Selection for Integrated Communication and Navigation
cited_evidence.quote: The second paper frames beamforming with satellite selection for integrated communication and navigation.

claims.rationale: The shared LEO beamforming framing is supported, while the higher-level difference is synthesized from two quotes.

claims.claim_text: The comparison proves real-world deployment superiority.

cited_evidence.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications Enabling Extremely Narrow Beams
cited_evidence.quote: The first paper frames space-time beamforming for narrow LEO beams.

claims.rationale: The cited framing evidence does not prove deployment superiority.
